heading: Enforcement provisions
label: 70053 Enforcement provisions
text: The President may employ such departments, agencies, officers, or instrumentalities of the United States as he may deem necessary to carry out this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection, as added by , is based on acts , title II, § 4, ; , ; , (2), , , which was formerly classified to , War and National Defense, before being transferred to this chapter and renumbered as this section.Pub.
